name: pnmc
tagline: Symbolic Model Checker for Petri Nets
body:
About
=====

Pnmc is a symbolic model checker for [Petri nets](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Petri_net) written in C++14. It uses the [libsdd library](https://github.com/ahamez/libsdd) which implements Hierarchical Set Decision Diagrams. It ranked second at the [Model Checking Contest](http://mcc.lip6.fr) in 2014 and 2015, in the State Space category.

Pre-compiled binaries for Linux 64 bits are available [here](https://github.com/ahamez/pnmc/releases).

Features
========

- Symbolic generation of state spaces
- Symbolic generation of state spaces of Timed Petri nets using discrete time semantics
- Verification of dead states (deadlocks)
- Verification of dead transitions
- Verification of a subset of the reachability properties of the [Model Checking Contest](http://mcc.lip6.fr)

License
=======

Pnmc is released under the [BSD license](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ahamez/pnmc/master/LICENSE).

News
====

- (2016-06-30) pnmc ranked third at the [Model Checking Contest](http://mcc.lip6.fr/results.php) in the State Space category; 10 tools were participating.
- (2015-08-30) Version [20150830](https://github.com/ahamez/pnmc/releases/tag/20150830) released:
  - Fixes a situation were untimed transitions would not update impacted timed transitions;
  - [Tina](http://projects.laas.fr/tina)'s [.net format](http://projects.laas.fr/tina//manuals/formats.html#2) is now the default one.
- (2015-08-19) pnmc ranked second at the [Model Checking Contest](http://mcc.lip6.fr/2015/results.php) in the State Space category; 11 tools were participating.
